title: Keto Poblano Burrito
description: A keto twist on the classic burrito, featuring roasted poblanos and robust flavors.
instructions: Roast the poblanos in the oven for 30 minutes.
Cook the Mexican ground beef in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the cumin, chili powder, and salt to the ground beef. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Warm the low-carb tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the burritos by placing a portion of the ground beef mixture onto a tortilla, followed by a roasted poblano, and finally a sprinkle of shredded cheese.
